name: Orbt XL
short_description: Defy gravity in Orbt XL! A fast-paced, addictive, 'just-one-more-round' arcade score chaser. Stay in orbit, dodge obstacles, and rack up points, the closer you are to the black hole, the higher your score! Easy to learn, tough to master, and perfect for quick play sessions while waiting in queue.
detailed_description:
Stay in Orbit. Dodge Obstacles. Chase High Scores.

Can you survive the pull of the black hole? Stay in orbit as long as possible while avoiding obstacles and pushing your luck for maximum points! The closer you orbit to the center, the faster your score climbs, but beware, the challenge increases over time.

🔥 Fast-paced, one-button arcade gameplay
🔥 Simple to learn, tough to master
🔥 Endless high-score chasing action

How to Play:

  • Press the orbit button to push away from the black hole.

  • Release to drift closer to danger.

  • Survive, rack up points, and chase the leaderboard!

Controls:
🖱️ Left Mouse Button | 🎮 Gamepad 'A' | 👆 Touch Screen Compatible

  • Easy-to-learn, one-button controls – Pick up and play instantly!

  • Endless, fast-paced, and increasingly challenging gameplay

  • Unlock 15+ unique planet skins with in-game points (cosmetic only)

  • 'Near Miss' bonus system – Earn extra points for risky close calls

  • Steam Achievements, Leaderboards, and Trading Cards (includes emoticons & profile wallpapers!)

  • Steam Cloud Support – Play anywhere, pick up where you left off

  • Steam Deck Support – Plays great on the deck

  • Localized in 25 languages – (Translations done via Google, so feedback is welcome!)

  • Perfect for quick play sessions – Great for killing time while queueing for another game!

🎵 Sound & Music:
The in-game audio was crafted using a mix of my own mouth sounds (yes, really) and royalty-free SFX from FreeSFX. The soundtrack features DJ Chacha - "Cover Trance."

This is a small, replayable, arcade score-chaser designed for quick but addictive gameplay. Your main goal? Beat your high score and unlock cosmetic skins while enjoying fast, responsive gameplay.

I'm always open to feedback! If you run into any issues, spot something misleading on the store page, or just want to say hello, feel free to reach out via Discord or my website.

Thank you for checking out Orbt XL, I hope you enjoy playing!

- Adam Nickerson | Adamvision Studios

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Arabic, Bulgarian, Czech, Danish, Dutch, Finnish, Greek, Hungarian, Japanese, Korean, Norwegian, Polish, Portuguese - Portugal, Portuguese - Brazil, Romanian, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Swedish, Thai, Traditional Chinese, Turkish, Ukrainian, Spanish - Latin America
